title: Dr. Jack
writer: Hal Roach, Sam Taylor, Jean C. Havez
actors: Harold Lloyd, Mildred Davis, John T. Prince
plot: Country doctor Jack Jackson is called in to treat the Sick-Little-Well-Girl, who has been making Dr. Saulsbourg and his sanitarium very rich, after years of unsuccessful treatment. Dr. Jack's old-fashioned methods do the trick, an...
